title: Main window does not show
author: lujiaxing
body_snippet:
After I removed a user profile (exported from legacy version), The application crashed on startup:

Exception at 0x00007FFAB6A0313C (in mRemoteNG.exe): 0xC0000005: Access violation reading location 0x0000000000000000.

Log:
```
2026-02-26 10:06:01,148 [2] INFO  - mRemoteNG Connection Manager 1.78.2 (Nightly Build 3228) x64 starting.
2026-02-26 10:06:01,151 [2] INFO  - Command Line: B:\mRemoteNG\mRemoteNG.dll
2026-02-26 10:06:01,201 [2] INFO  - Microsoft Windows 10 企业版  64-bit
2026-02-26 10:06:01...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `1d5c8fba` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Main window does not show

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.
